sentences.arabic: تُشَكِّلُ الأَعْيَادُ، مِثْلُ عِيدِ الفِطْرِ وَعِيدِ الأَضْحَى، مُنَاسَبَاتٍ بَهِيَّةً تَمْلأُ القُلُوبَ بِالفَرَحِ وَتُعَزِّزُ قِيَمَ التَّسَامُحِ وَالعَطَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Praznici, poput Ramazanskog bajrama i Kurban-bajrama, predstavljaju radosne prilike koje ispunjavaju srca srećom i jačaju vrijednosti tolerancije i darivanja.
sentences.translationEn: Festivals, such as Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha, constitute joyful occasions that fill hearts with happiness and strengthen the values of tolerance and giving.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الِاحْتِفَالَاتُ بِصَلَاةِ العِيدِ فِي السَّاحَاتِ العَامَّةِ، حَيْثُ يَتَبَادَلُ النَّاسُ التَّهَانِيَ وَالتَّبْرِيكَاتِ بِجَوٍّ مِنَ المَوَدَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Proslave počinju bajram-namazom na javnim trgovima, gdje ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke i blagoslove u atmosferi naklonosti.
sentences.translationEn: Celebrations begin with the Eid prayer in public squares, where people exchange greetings and blessings in an atmosphere of affection.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَدِي العَائِلَاتُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً، وَيُسْرِعُ الأَطْفَالُ لِتَلَقِّي 'العِيدِيَّةِ' الَّتِي تُرْسِمُ البَسْمَةَ عَلَى وُجُوهِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Porodice nose novu odjeću, a djeca žure da prime 'bajramluk' koji im crta osmjeh na licima.
sentences.translationEn: Families wear new clothes, and children rush to receive the 'Eidiya' (gift money) that puts a smile on their faces.

sentences.arabic: وَتَشْتَهِرُ المَائِدَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ فِي هَذِهِ الأَيَّامِ بِأَصْنَافٍ خَاصَّةٍ مِنَ الحَلْوِيَّاتِ، مِثْلَ المَعْمُولِ وَالغُرَيْبَةِ، الَّتِي تُقَدَّمُ لِلزُّوَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska trpeza ovih dana poznata je po posebnim vrstama slatkiša, poput ma'mula i ghuraybe, koji se nude posjetiteljima.
sentences.translationEn: The Arab table during these days is famous for special types of sweets, such as ma'amoul and ghurayba, which are offered to visitors.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَهْتَمُّ الجَمِيعُ بِتَقْدِيمِ الصَّدَقَاتِ لِلْمُحْتَاجِينَ لِضَمَانِ أَنْ تَعُمَّ السَّعَادَةُ كُلَّ بَيْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, svi se brinu o davanju sadake potrebnima kako bi osigurali da sreća obuzme svaki dom.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone is also keen to provide charity to the needy to ensure that happiness reaches every home.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدَ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ طُقُوسٍ، بَلْ هِيَ تَجْسِيدٌ لِلتَّكَافُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ وَالرُّوحِ الجَمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove tradicije nisu samo puki rituali, već su utjelovljenje društvene solidarnosti i kolektivnog duha.
sentences.translationEn: These traditions are not just rituals, but an embodiment of social solidarity and collective spirit.
